<div class="sphinxpress-doc">
<section id="offset-preserving-segmentation">
<h1>Offset-Preserving Segmentation</h1>
<section id="overview">
<h2>Overview</h2>
<p>The offset-preserving segmentation API provides precise character-level mapping between
segments and the original input text. This is essential for downstream processing tasks
like text-to-speech synthesis, where you need to maintain exact correspondence between
processed segments and source text.</p>
</section>
<section id="key-features">
<h2>Key Features</h2>
<ol class="arabic simple">
<li><p><strong>Character Offsets</strong>: Each segment includes <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">char_start</span></code> and <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">char_end</span></code> that map
exactly to the original input</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Stable IDs</strong>: Hierarchical identifiers (e.g., <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">p0s1c2</span></code>) that are stable across runs</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Exact Slices</strong>: Segment text always equals the exact input slice (no normalization)</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Monotonic Offsets</strong>: Segments are ordered with non-overlapping ranges</p></li>
<li><p><strong>Backend Agnostic</strong>: Works with both spaCy (accurate) and regex (fast) backends</p></li>
</ol>
</section>
<section id="coordinate-system">
<h2>Coordinate System</h2>
<p>All character offsets use Python’s standard 0-based indexing with exclusive end
positions:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello world. How are you?&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">SplitSegment</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="nb">id</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;p0s0&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;Hello world.&quot;</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">char_start</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">char_end</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">12</span><span class="p">,</span>  <span class="c1"># exclusive</span>
    <span class="o">...</span>
<span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Verify offset mapping</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="offset-guarantees">
<h2>Offset Guarantees</h2>
<p><strong>Exact Mapping</strong></p>
<p>The fundamental guarantee is that for any segment:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">original_text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p>This holds true even with:</p>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p>Multiple paragraphs</p></li>
<li><p>Complex punctuation</p></li>
<li><p>Unicode characters</p></li>
<li><p>Whitespace variations</p></li>
</ul>
<p>Offsets are always computed against the original input text, even when the splitter
applies internal corrections (ellipsis protection, abbreviation fixes).</p>
<p><strong>Monotonic, Non-Overlapping Offsets</strong></p>
<p>Segments are emitted in document order and do not overlap:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;=</span> <span class="n">last_end</span>
    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Runtime Validation</strong></p>
<p><code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">split_with_offsets()</span></code> validates its output (bounds, exact-slice, and ordering). If any
invariant is violated, it raises <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">ValueError</span></code> with details about the invalid segment.</p>
<p><strong>Whitespace Handling</strong></p>
<p>Segment text is always an exact slice of the original input. The splitter skips
leading/trailing whitespace at paragraph and sentence boundaries, so whitespace between
segments may be excluded. Compare offsets using direct equality:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">extracted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">extracted</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="usage-examples">
<h2>Usage Examples</h2>
<section id="basic-usage">
<h3>Basic Usage</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello world. How are you?</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">nNew paragraph.&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">id</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Verify offset</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="modes">
<h3>Modes</h3>
<p><strong>Paragraph Mode</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;paragraph&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Returns one segment per paragraph</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Sentence Mode</strong> (default)</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Returns one segment per sentence</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
<p><strong>Clause Mode</strong></p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;clause&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="c1"># Returns one segment per comma-separated clause</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="backend-selection">
<h3>Backend Selection</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Auto-detect (uses spaCy if available)</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Force spaCy (more accurate)</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">True</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Force regex (faster, no dependencies)</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">use_spacy</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="kc">False</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="max-length-splitting">
<h3>Max Length Splitting</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Split long segments at word boundaries</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">max_chars</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="mi">100</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># All segments will be ≤ 100 characters</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="nb">all</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">s</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">&lt;=</span> <span class="mi">100</span> <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">s</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Offsets still work correctly</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="working-with-offsets">
<h2>Working with Offsets</h2>
<section id="extract-surrounding-context">
<h3>Extract Surrounding Context</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segment</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span>

<span class="c1"># Get 20 characters before segment</span>
<span class="n">context_start</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">max</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">-</span> <span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">before</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">context_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">]</span>

<span class="c1"># Get 20 characters after segment</span>
<span class="n">context_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="nb">min</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">),</span> <span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span> <span class="o">+</span> <span class="mi">20</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="n">after</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">segment</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">context_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="reconstruct-original-text">
<h3>Reconstruct Original Text</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Segments don&#39;t overlap, but may not cover all text</span>
<span class="c1"># (whitespace between paragraphs may be skipped)</span>

<span class="n">reconstructed_parts</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="mi">0</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="c1"># Add any gap</span>
    <span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">&gt;</span> <span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="n">reconstructed_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">])</span>

    <span class="c1"># Add segment</span>
    <span class="n">reconstructed_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span>

<span class="c1"># Add any trailing text</span>
<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">last_end</span> <span class="o">&lt;</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">):</span>
    <span class="n">reconstructed_parts</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">last_end</span><span class="p">:])</span>

<span class="n">reconstructed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">join</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">reconstructed_parts</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="map-edits-back-to-original">
<h3>Map Edits Back to Original</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="c1"># Process segments (e.g., TTS synthesis)</span>
<span class="n">processed</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">result</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">some_processing</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="n">processed</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">append</span><span class="p">({</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;original_position&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">),</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;original_text&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
        <span class="s2">&quot;result&quot;</span><span class="p">:</span> <span class="n">result</span>
    <span class="p">})</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="edge-cases">
<h2>Edge Cases</h2>
<section id="empty-text">
<h3>Empty Text</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="whitespace-only-text">
<h3>Whitespace-Only Text</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="s2">&quot;   </span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n   &quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="p">[]</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="no-sentence-breaks">
<h3>No Sentence Breaks</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Just one sentence&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="nb">len</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">)</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">1</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="mi">0</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="unicode-and-special-characters">
<h3>Unicode and Special Characters</h3>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Café résumé. Über große Möbel.&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Offsets work correctly with multibyte characters</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="boundary-whitespace">
<h2>Boundary Whitespace</h2>
<p>Segments are anchored to the first and last non-whitespace characters inside each
paragraph. Whitespace between paragraphs or sentences may not be included in any
segment, but the exact-slice invariant always holds.</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;  Hello.  </span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n</span><span class="se">\\</span><span class="s2">n  World.  &quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">0</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello.&quot;</span>
<span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="mi">1</span><span class="p">]</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="s2">&quot;World.&quot;</span>

<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">extracted</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_start</span><span class="p">:</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">char_end</span><span class="p">]</span>
    <span class="k">assert</span> <span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">==</span> <span class="n">extracted</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="integration-with-markup-languages">
<h2>Integration with Markup Languages</h2>
<p>When working with text containing markup (SSMD, Speech Markdown, Mustache templates,
etc.), you need to ensure segmentation doesn’t break markup tags or placeholders.</p>
<section id="common-pattern-library">
<h3>Common Pattern Library</h3>
<p>The <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">COMMON_PATTERNS</span></code> dictionary provides regex patterns for common markup formats:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span>

<span class="c1"># Available patterns:</span>
<span class="c1"># - &quot;ssmd&quot;: SSMD format [text]{lang=&quot;de&quot;}</span>
<span class="c1"># - &quot;speechmarkdown&quot;: Speech Markdown ((text)[key:&quot;value&quot;;...])</span>
<span class="c1"># - &quot;mustache&quot;: Mustache templates {{variable}}</span>
<span class="c1"># - &quot;html_tag&quot;: HTML/XML tags &lt;tag&gt;...&lt;/tag&gt;</span>
<span class="c1"># - &quot;markdown_link&quot;: Markdown links [text](url)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="ssmd-integration-example">
<h3>SSMD Integration Example</h3>
<p>For SSMD (Structured Synthesis Markup Document) escaped text:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="kn">import</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">ssmd</span>  <span class="c1"># hypothetical SSMD library</span>

<span class="c1"># 1. Escape markup before splitting</span>
<span class="n">original</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello [world]{lang=&#39;de&#39;}. How are you?&quot;</span>
<span class="n">escaped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ssmd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">escape_ssmd_syntax</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">original</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># 2. Split with offsets</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">escaped</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># 3. Validate that placeholders weren&#39;t broken</span>
<span class="n">warnings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">escaped</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">placeholder_pattern</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;ssmd&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="k">if</span> <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">w</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">warnings</span><span class="p">:</span>
        <span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Warning: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">w</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># 4. Unescape each segment</span>
<span class="k">for</span> <span class="n">seg</span> <span class="ow">in</span> <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">:</span>
    <span class="n">unescaped</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">ssmd</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">unescape_ssmd_syntax</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">seg</span><span class="o">.</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">)</span>
    <span class="c1"># Process unescaped text...</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="custom-markup-patterns">
<h3>Custom Markup Patterns</h3>
<p>For custom markup formats, provide your own regex pattern:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span>

<span class="c1"># Custom pattern for your markup format</span>
<span class="n">my_pattern</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="sa">r</span><span class="s2">&quot;\[\[([^\]]+)\]\]&quot;</span>  <span class="c1"># Matches [[placeholder]]</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;Hello [[name]]. Welcome to [[location]].&quot;</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="s2">&quot;sentence&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Validate with custom pattern</span>
<span class="n">warnings</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">validate_no_placeholder_breaks</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">segments</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">placeholder_pattern</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">my_pattern</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
<section id="choosing-safe-splitting-mode">
<h3>Choosing Safe Splitting Mode</h3>
<p>Use <code class="docutils literal notranslate"><span class="pre">suggest_splitting_mode()</span></code> to find a safe mode that avoids breaking markup:</p>
<div class="highlight-python notranslate"><div class="highlight"><pre><span></span><span class="kn">from</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="nn">phrasplit</span><span class="w"> </span><span class="kn">import</span> <span class="n">suggest_splitting_mode</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span>

<span class="n">text</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="s2">&quot;First sentence with [markup]{lang=&#39;de&#39;}. Second sentence.&quot;</span>

<span class="c1"># Get suggested mode that won&#39;t break SSMD placeholders</span>
<span class="n">mode</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">suggest_splitting_mode</span><span class="p">(</span>
    <span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span>
    <span class="n">placeholder_pattern</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">COMMON_PATTERNS</span><span class="p">[</span><span class="s2">&quot;ssmd&quot;</span><span class="p">]</span>
<span class="p">)</span>
<span class="nb">print</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="sa">f</span><span class="s2">&quot;Recommended mode: </span><span class="si">{</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="si">}</span><span class="s2">&quot;</span><span class="p">)</span>

<span class="c1"># Use the suggested mode</span>
<span class="n">segments</span> <span class="o">=</span> <span class="n">split_with_offsets</span><span class="p">(</span><span class="n">text</span><span class="p">,</span> <span class="n">mode</span><span class="o">=</span><span class="n">mode</span><span class="p">)</span>
</pre></div>
</div>
</section>
</section>
<section id="see-also">
<h2>See Also</h2>
<ul class="simple">
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../streaming/"><span class="doc">Streaming API</span></a> - Streaming iterator API</p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../api/"><span class="doc">API Reference</span></a> - Complete API reference</p></li>
<li><p><a class="reference internal" href="../examples/"><span class="doc">Examples</span></a> - More examples</p></li>
</ul>
</section>
</section>
</div>
<script data-sphinxpress-script="search" defer>
(function () {
  "use strict";

  function initForm(form) {
    var input = form.querySelector(".tool-search-input");
    var results = form.querySelector(".tool-search-results");
    var navList = form.parentElement
      ? form.parentElement.querySelector(".tool-nav-list")
      : null;
    if (!input || !results) {
      return;
    }
    var emptyText = form.getAttribute("data-search-empty") || "No matches.";
    var indexUrl = form.getAttribute("data-search-index");
    if (!indexUrl) {
      hideForm();
      return;
    }

    var indexEntries = null;
    var indexError = false;
    var pendingQuery = null;

    function hideForm() {
      form.style.display = "none";
    }

    function escapeHtml(value) {
      return value
        .replace(/&/g, "&amp;")
        .replace(/</g, "&lt;")
        .replace(/>/g, "&gt;")
        .replace(/"/g, "&quot;")
        .replace(/'/g, "&#39;");
    }

    function showEmpty() {
      results.innerHTML =
        '<p class="tool-search-empty">' + escapeHtml(emptyText) + "</p>";
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function clearResults() {
      results.innerHTML = "";
      results.hidden = true;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = false;
      }
    }

    function renderResults(entries, tokens) {
      if (!entries.length) {
        showEmpty();
        return;
      }
      var html = entries
        .map(function (entry) {
          var snippetHtml = renderSnippet(entry, tokens);
          var href = entry.url + "#sphinxpress-search-hit";
          return (
            '<li class="tool-search-result">' +
            '<a href="' +
            escapeHtml(href) +
            '">' +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-title">' +
            escapeHtml(entry.title) +
            "</p>" +
            '<p class="tool-search-result-snippet">' +
            snippetHtml +
            "</p>" +
            "</a>" +
            "</li>"
          );
        })
        .join("");
      results.innerHTML = html;
      results.hidden = false;
      if (navList) {
        navList.hidden = true;
      }
    }

    function renderSnippet(entry, tokens) {
      var source = entry.snippet || "";
      if (!source) {
        return "";
      }
      var lower = source.toLowerCase();
      var firstToken = tokens[0] || "";
      var idx = lower.indexOf(firstToken);
      if (idx < 0) {
        return escapeHtml(source);
      }
      var before = source.slice(0, idx);
      var match = source.slice(idx, idx + firstToken.length);
      var after = source.slice(idx + firstToken.length);
      return (
        escapeHtml(before) +
        "<mark>" +
        escapeHtml(match) +
        "</mark>" +
        escapeHtml(after)
      );
    }

    function runQuery(query) {
      if (!indexEntries) {
        return;
      }
      var tokens = query
        .toLowerCase()
        .split(/\s+/)
        .filter(function (token) {
          return token.length > 0;
        });
      if (!tokens.length) {
        clearResults();
        return;
      }
      var hits = [];
      for (var i = 0; i < indexEntries.length; i += 1) {
        var entry = indexEntries[i];
        if (!entry.sections || !entry.sections.length) {
          continue;
        }
        var matched = true;
        var score = 0;
        for (var t = 0; t < tokens.length; t += 1) {
          var token = tokens[t];
          var found = false;
          var tokenScore = 0;
          for (var s = 0; s < entry.sections.length; s += 1) {
            var section = entry.sections[s];
            var lowerText = section.lower || "";
            if (!lowerText) {
              continue;
            }
            var from = 0;
            while (from <= lowerText.length) {
              var foundAt = lowerText.indexOf(token, from);
              if (foundAt < 0) {
                break;
              }
              tokenScore += 1;
              from = foundAt + token.length;
            }
            if (tokenScore > 0) {
              found = true;
            }
          }
          if (!found) {
            matched = false;
            break;
          }
          score += tokenScore;
        }
        if (matched) {
          hits.push({ entry: entry, score: score });
        }
      }
      hits.sort(function (a, b) {
        return b.score - a.score;
      });
      var top = hits.slice(0, 20).map(function (hit) {
        return hit.entry;
      });
      renderResults(top, tokens);
    }

    function handleInput() {
      var query = input.value || "";
      if (!query.trim()) {
        clearResults();
        pendingQuery = null;
        return;
      }
      if (indexError) {
        hideForm();
        return;
      }
      if (indexEntries) {
        runQuery(query);
      } else {
        pendingQuery = query;
      }
    }

    input.addEventListener("input", handleInput);

    fetch(indexUrl, { credentials: "same-origin" })
      .then(function (response) {
        if (!response.ok) {
          throw new Error("HTTP " + response.status);
        }
        return response.json();
      })
      .then(function (payload) {
        if (
          !payload ||
          !Array.isArray(payload.entries) ||
          payload.entries.length === 0
        ) {
          hideForm();
          return;
        }
        indexEntries = payload.entries;
        if (pendingQuery) {
          runQuery(pendingQuery);
        }
      })
      .catch(function () {
        indexError = true;
        if (input.value && input.value.trim()) {
          hideForm();
        } else {
          hideForm();
        }
      });
  }

  function init() {
    var forms = document.querySelectorAll("form.tool-search");
    for (var i = 0; i < forms.length; i += 1) {
      initForm(forms[i]);
    }
  }

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", init);
  } else {
    init();
  }
})();

</script>
{% endraw %}
